name: no-direct-intents-write
description: Block direct mutation of S.planIntents outside BRAIN.plan.intent canonical writers.
rationale: Every intent mutation must go through BRAIN.plan.intent.{add,update,remove,setBucket} so source-tag is validated and BRAIN.audit captures the change. Direct .push/.splice bypasses both. Mirrors no-direct-debts-mutation precedent.
error_message_template: Direct intents mutation at {{file}}:{{line}}. Use BRAIN.plan.intent.{add,update,remove,setBucket}(...) instead. (Canonical writers validate source-tag and audit the change.)
